      Perio Master Clinic 2026

      The EFP International Perio Master Clinic is the premier forum for the promotion of clinical excellence in emerging and important clinical challenges in our specialty.

  • For Patients
  • Publications Hub
  • Education

    Education

    The EFP's work in education includes a set of curricular guidelines for undergraduate dental education, a three-year accredited programme for postgraduate education in periodontology, and some continuing education tools for reference and consultation of dental professionals all along their careers. Besides, this area is the home of the 'EFP Alumni' section.

    • Undergraduate education
    • Postgraduate education

  • EuroPerio
  1. Home

EuroPerio12

EuroPerio12

EuroPerio is the world’s leading congress in periodontology and implant dentistry. The congress features a rich and varied scientific programme, including live surgeries, interactive sessions, and much more. With top speakers from all over the world who are the most respected masters in their fields, it's the ideal place to meet friends and colleagues and exchange the latest information.

Join us from May 10-13, 2028 in Munich, Germany for EuroPerio12!

 

 

 

Sponsors & Exhibitors 

Save the Date Industry site inspection (ICM Munich): June 9, 2026

For any questions regarding industry opportunities, including industry site visit, please contact Ellen Valckenaere.

To be added to the EFP Events exhibition and sponsorship mailing list and receive all further update on sponsorship and exhibition at EuroPerio12 and the EFP events, click the button.

 

Subscribe to the industry mailing list

This was EuroPerio11

EuroPerio11 took place from 14–17 May 2025 in Vienna, Austria, bringing together 10,000 participants for an exceptional and highly engaging meeting.

This year’s congress included live surgeries, interactive sessions, and contributions from more than 150 internationally renowned experts. 

We are grateful to look back on a successful and inspiring event. Revisit the highlights here:
 

EuroPerio11 Picture Gallery

 

 

EuroPerio11 Highlight Video

Key dates to remember

Name Date
Call for input by EFP Member Societies January 13, 2026
Industry site inspection (ICM Munich) June 9, 2026
Applications for Sponsoring Packages open June 2026
Release pre-liminary Scientific Programme Summer 2026
Applications for the Exhibition open October 2026
Registration opens September 2027
Abstract Submission opens September 2027
Abstract & EFP Research Prize Manuscript Submission deadline December 2027
Latest notification/classification of accepted abstracts January 2028
Registration Early Bird deadline January 2028
Regular fee registration deadline April 2028
EuroPerio12 – Munich, Germany May 10-13, 2028

Sign up to our newsletter

The EFP publishes a free monthtly email newsletter with the latest news about the federation's activities, its publications, and its campaigns.
